zh.Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特
zh.Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes,: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也索維尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guiberge de Bourbon於大約1120年出生在法國布爾波乃斯時，她的父親Archambaud de BOURBON VII11歲，母親Agnes de Savoie18歲。她於1160年與Ebles IV de Charenton在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也索維尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1188年享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guiberge de Bourbon于大约1120年出生在法国布爾波乃斯时，她的父亲Archambaud de BOURBON VII11岁，母亲Agnes de Savoie18岁。她于1160年与Ebles IV de Charenton在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也索維尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1188年享年69岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

en.lifeSummary: When Guiberge de Bourbon was born about 1120, in Bourbonnais, France, her father, Archambaud de BOURBON VII, was 11 and her mother, Agnes de Savoie, was 18. She married Ebles IV de Charenton in 1160, in Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1188, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guiberge de Bourbon est née environ 1120, à Bourbonnais, France, son père, Archambaud de BOURBON VII, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Savoie, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Ebles IV de Charenton en 1160, à Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1188, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guiberge de Bourbon um 1120 in Bourbonnais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archambaud de BOURBON VII 11 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Savoie 18. Sie hat 1160 in Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Ebles IV de Charenton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1188 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guiberge de Bourbon è nata il circa 1120 nel Bourbonnais, Francia, sua padre, Archambaud de BOURBON VII, aveva 11 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Savoie, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Ebles IV de Charenton nel 1160, nel Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1188, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guiberge de Bourbonが約1120年にフランスボウルボナイスで生まれた時，父Archambaud de BOURBON VIIは11歳，母Agnes de Savoieは18歳であった。1160年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールソウヴィグニーでEbles IV de Charentonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1188年に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guiberge de Bourbon(이)가 대략 1120년 프랑스 부르보나이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archambaud de BOURBON VII(은)는 11세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Savoie(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1160년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 소우비그니에서 Ebles IV de Charenton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1188년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guiberge de Bourbon nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Bourbonnais, França, seu pai, Archambaud de BOURBON VII, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Savoie, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Ebles IV de Charenton em 1160, em Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1188, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guiberge de Bourbon родилась около 1120 г. в местности бурбоннеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Archambaud de BOURBON VII было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Savoie, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ebles IV de Charenton в 1160 г. в местности соувигни, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1188 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

Se casó con Ebles IV de Charenton en 1160, en Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1188, a la edad de 69 años.
